items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for grant-level separation per user->biz pair. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete checks or validations that directly address this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful bookings and member interactions, none of the evidence directly supports the specific policy requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
